Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tiberian Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The report mentions the life and death of Tiberian Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian Arelius was the Monarch of House Arelius who died eight years ago.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan was an advisor to Tiberian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Tiberian has a palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Tiberian Arelius was the Storm King and Patriarch of House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Tiberian Arelius was known for spiritual attacks and created the Pure Storm Baptism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Tiberian Arelius once used words that Northstrider remembered Reigan Shen using.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Tiberian Arelius is a creator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Tiberian Arelius was a Monarch and an advisor to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Tiberian once showed Reigan Shen the key to the western labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Tiberian is deceased.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Tiberian Arelius has blue eyes with lightning crackling behind them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Tiberian Arelius has an advisor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Tiberian was the Monarch and leader of the Arelius clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan was the advisor to the Monarch Tiberian Arelius early in his advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Tiberian Arelius was a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan formed his reputation with Tiberian through insight into the first Patriarch's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian is a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian's Remnant is a Monarch without months of hunger aura eroding his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian's Remnant has a golden collar encircling its throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian's Remnant has a voice like buzzing lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian's Remnant is a spirit at least as dense as Little Blue or Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Reigan Shen intends to fulfill Tiberian's dream.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian's dream was to rid the world of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Tiberian was not a match for Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Tiberian wanted the Dreadgods killed and for them to ascend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Tiberian swore Eithan to silence on certain issues.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen might have been Tiberian's best friend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Tiberian used a large thunderbolt attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Tiberian gave Cladia a treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Tiberian is a character whose Remnant Reigan is repairing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Sha Miara claims Reigan Shen betrayed Tiberian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Tiberian has a beard hewn from lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Tiberian is a storm-Remnant.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius is a man with short blond hair and eyes that crackle with blue electricity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius is the second-best Underlord of his age.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius is a spearman whose weapon crackles with multicolored lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius's madra shifts between a fluid river, a powerful gust, and a devastating thunderbolt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius is a human opponent of Reigan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian is an Arelius Underlord who uses a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian possesses a bloodline ability that allows him to move as if he has seen the fight play out in advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius is a prince of House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian Arelius uses an Enforcer technique involving three-colored lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Tiberian is a character who laughed and clapped Reigan on the back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — A young Tiberian Arelius fought in the first Uncrowned King tournament.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
